details.productUrlName: Esika God of the Tree Display Commander Thick Stock

customAttributes.description:
From Cute to Brute

Esika, God of the Tree 1GG
Vigilance
T: Add one mana of any color.
Other legendary creatures you control have vigilance and "T: Add one mana of any color."
The Prismatic Bridge WUBRG
At the beginning of your upkeep, reveal cards from the top of your library until you reveal a creature or planeswalker card. Put that card onto the battlefield and the rest on the bottom of your library in a random order.

This card is significantly thicker than a standard MTG card and may not be playable.
customAttributes.flavorText: The beginning of the rainbow. // The end of us all.
